sentences.arabic: حِينَمَا تَلِجُ أزِقَّةَ الأَسْوَاقِ القَدِيمَةِ، تَسْتَقْبِلُكَ أَمْواجٌ مُتَلاطِمَةٌ مِنْ رَوائِحِ التَّوابِلِ الَّتِي تُسافِرُ بِكَ عَبْرَ طَرِيقِ الحَرِيرِ الغَابِرِ.
sentences.translation: Kada zakoračite u sokake starih bazara, dočekaju vas uzburkani valovi mirisa začina koji vas vode na putovanje drevnim Putem svile.
sentences.translationEn: When you enter the alleys of the old markets, you are greeted by crashing waves of spice scents that transport you across the ancient Silk Road.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَصُّ الأَكْياسُ المَمْلُوءَةُ بِالقِرْفَةِ وَالزَّنْجَبِيلِ وَالفُلْفُلِ الأَسْوَدِ فِي مَشْهَدٍ بَصَرِيٍّ يُشْبِهُ الفُسَيْفِساءَ المُلَوَّنَةَ الَّتِي تَسْلِبُ الأَنْظارَ.
sentences.translation: Vreće ispunjene cimetom, đumbirom i crnim biberom poredane su u vizualni prizor sličan šarenom mozaiku koji oduzima dah.
sentences.translationEn: Sacks filled with cinnamon, ginger, and black pepper are lined up in a visual scene resembling a colorful mosaic that captivates the eyes.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ الحَوانِيتَ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ مَراكِزَ لِلتِّجارَةِ، بَلْ هِيَ مَستَوْدَعاتٌ لِلذَّاكِرَةِ الثَّقافِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَفِظَتْ أَسْرارَ المَطْبَخِ العَرَبِيِّ الأَصِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi dućani nisu samo trgovački centri, već skladišta kulturnog pamćenja koja su sačuvala tajne autentične arapske kuhinje.
sentences.translationEn: These shops are not just centers for trade, but repositories of cultural memory that have preserved the secrets of authentic Arab cuisine.

sentences.arabic: يَتَناقَلُ العَطَّارُونَ خِبْراتِهِمْ فِي خَلْطِ "البُهاراتِ السَّبْعِ" بِدِقَّةٍ مُتَناهِيَةٍ، مُراعِينَ التَّوازُنَ الدَّقِيقَ بَيْنَ المَذاقِ الحادِّ وَالنَّكْهَةِ العَطِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci začinima prenose svoja iskustva u miješanju 'sedam začina' s krajnjom preciznošću, pazeći na delikatnu ravnotežu između oštrog okusa i mirisne arome.
sentences.translationEn: Spice merchants pass down their expertise in mixing the 'Seven Spices' with extreme precision, observing the delicate balance between sharp taste and fragrant flavor.

sentences.arabic: وَتَجِدُ فِي زَوايا هَذِهِ الأَسْواقِ أَنْواعاً نادِرَةً مِنَ الأَعْشابِ البَرِّيَّةِ الَّتِي تُضْفِي طَابَعاً فَرِيداً عَلَى الأَطْبَاقِ المَحَلِيَّةِ، مُحَوِّلَةً الوَجْبَةَ إِلَى تَجْرِبَةٍ وُجُودِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: U uglovima ovih bazara nalazite rijetke vrste divljeg bilja koje daju jedinstven karakter lokalnim jelima, pretvarajući obrok u egzistencijalno iskustvo.
sentences.translationEn: In the corners of these markets, you find rare types of wild herbs that add a unique character to local dishes, turning the meal into an existential experience.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ ظَلَّتْ هَذِهِ المُكَوِّناتُ عِماداً لِلتَّغْذِيَةِ السَّلِيمَةِ وَرُكْناً أَساسِيّاً فِي فَنِّ الطَّهْيِ الَّذِي يَمْزُجُ بَيْنَ اللَّذَّةِ وَالفَائِدَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi sastojci su ostali oslonac zdrave ishrane i temeljni stub kulinarske umjetnosti koja spaja užitak sa zdravstvenom dobrobiti.
sentences.translationEn: These ingredients have remained a mainstay of sound nutrition and a fundamental pillar in the art of cooking that blends pleasure with health benefits.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذا يَبْقَى السُّوقُ قَلْباً نابِضاً بِالحَياةِ، يَحْكِي قِصَصَ الشُّعُوبِ الَّتِي تَعَارَفَتْ وَتَآلَفَتْ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةِ الطَّعَامِ العَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako bazar ostaje srce koje kuca životom, pričajući priče o narodima koji su se upoznali i zbližili oko univerzalne trpeze.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, the market remains a heart beating with life, telling the stories of peoples who became acquainted and harmonized around the global dining table.
